Feats — Male Human Rogue: 8
Strength: 18 (+4) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Criminal Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 4; Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 2; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 40185/48000 Level: 8 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 270/540
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Actor: +1 Charisma
Athlete: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Fate: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)

Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Ability Boost (Strength)

Boon Of The Night Spirit: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Durable: +1 Constitution
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Heavily Armored: +1 Strength
Heavy Armor Master: +1 Strength
Keen Mind: +1 Intelligence

Moderately Armored: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Observant: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom)
Resilient: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Tavern Brawler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Weapon Master: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Ability Boosts: 19 to distribute
Athlete: Standing, running long jump, and running high jump each use only 5' of movement/Can climb at full speed
Second-Story Work: Has a 30' climb Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Actor; Alert; Archery; Athlete; Blind Fighting; Boon Of Combat Prowess; Boon Of Dimensional Travel; Boon Of Energy Resistance; Boon Of Fate; Boon Of Fortitude; Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity); Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength); Boon Of Recovery; Boon Of Skill; Boon Of Speed; Boon Of Spell Recall; Boon Of The Night Spirit; Boon Of Truesight; Charger; Chef; Crafter; Crossbow Expert; Crusher; Defense; Defensive Duelist; Dual Wielder; Dueling; Durable; Elemental Adept (Acid); Elemental Adept (Cold); Elemental Adept (Fire); Elemental Adept (Lightning); Elemental Adept (Thunder); Fey-Touched; Alert; Skill Proficiency (Sleight Of Hand; Stealth); Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools)
Feature Notes:
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat

Boon Of Skill: TODO
Boon Of Speed: TODO
Chef: TODO
Crafter: TODO
Crusher: TODO
Dueling: TODO
Fey-Touched: TODO
Interception: TODO
Keen Mind: Always knows the direction of north and hours until sunrise or sunset/Can recall anything seen or heard during the past month
Martial Weapon Training: TODO
Musician: TODO
Piercer: TODO
Poisoner: TODO
Protection: TODO
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Shadow-Touched: TODO

Slasher: TODO
Speedy: TODO

Unarmed Fighting: TODO
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +5 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +4 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +8 Stealth: (dex) +5
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +7 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Arcana; Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Animal Handling; Nature; Perception; Sleight Of Hand
Tool Proficiency: Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Celestial; Common; Dwarvish; Halfling; Thieves' Cant
Skill Notes:
Expertise: Has expertise in 4 chosen proficient skills
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Thieves' Cant; Choose 1 from any)
Actor: Has advantage on Deception and Performance to impersonate another person and can mimic others' speech or sounds
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Healer: Using a healer's kit to stabilize also restores 1 hit point/Can use a healer's kit to restore 1d6+4 + target HD hit points once per creature per short rest
Medium Armor Master: Suffers no Stealth disadvantage from wearing medium armor
Observant: Can read lips/+5 passive Investigation and passive Perception
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool check rolls
Second-Story Work: -3' running jump distance
Skulker: Can hide when lightly obscured/Ranged miss does not reveal position/Suffers no disadvantage on Perception from dim light
Combat
Hit Points: 52 Initiative: +5 Armor Class: 14
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Improvised; Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Padded Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+7 1d4+4 P R20/60; Nick); Javelin (+7 1d6+4 P R30/120; Slow); Light Hammer (+7 1d4+4 B R20/60; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+4 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +3 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +8
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Heavily Armored: Armor Proficiency (Heavy)
Lightly Armored: Armor Proficiency (Light)
Medium Armor Master: +1 Armor Class in medium armor if Dexterity is at least 16
Moderately Armored: Armor Proficiency (Medium/Shield)
Strength Attack Adjustment: +4
Strength Damage Adjustment: +4
Tavern Brawler: Weapon Proficiency (Improvised)/Unarmed attacks inflict 1d4 HP
Tough: +16 Hit Points
Weapon Master: Weapon Proficiency (Choose 4 from any Simple Weapon, any Martial Weapon)
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Can treat an attack miss as a hit once per turn
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Can teleport 30' after attacking or casting
Boon Of Fate: R60' Can modify a d20 roll by 2d4 once per initiative or rest
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +15 damage
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +18 damage
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Can use a bonus action to become invisible in dim or no light; taking an action, bonus action, or reaction ends
Charger: Can use a bonus action after a 10' Dash to attack (+5 damage) or to push 10'
Crossbow Expert: Ignores the loading quality of proficient crossbows/Suffers no disadvantage on ranged attacks within 5'/Can use a bonus action to make a hand crossbow attack after a one-handed attack
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict a choice of: poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates; Huge and larger targets are unaffected) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 15' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Defensive Duelist: Can use a reaction to gain +3 Armor Class when wielding a proficient finesse weapon
Dual Wielder: +1 Armor Class when wielding two melee weapons/Can use two-weapon fighting with any one-handed weapons/Can draw or stow two weapons simultaneously
Durable: Regains a minimum of 2 hit points from a Hit Die roll
Fast Hands: Can use a bonus action to disarm a trap, open a lock, pick a pocket, or take a Utilize action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Great Weapon Master: Can use a bonus action to attack after scoring a critical hit or reducing a foe to 0 hit points with a melee weapon/Can make a -5 attack with a heavy weapon to inflict +10 damage
Heavy Armor Master: Suffers -3 HP damage from nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing weapons when wearing heavy armor
Inspiring Leader: R30' 10-min speech gives 6 allies 11 temporary hit points once per target per short rest
Lucky: Can gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save or inflict foe disadvantage an attack on self 3 times per long rest
Mage Slayer: Can use a reaction to attack an adjacent caster/Foe suffers disadvantage on concentration to maintain a spell in response to a self attack
Mounted Combatant: Has advantage on melee attacks on an unmounted foe smaller than mount and can redirect attacks on mount to self
Polearm Master: Can use a bonus action to attack with the butt of a polearm, inflicting 1d4 HP bludgeoning, and a foe entering polearm reach provokes an opportunity attack
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sentinel: Successful opportunity attacks halt the target/Can take an opportunity attack when a foe uses Disengage/Can use a reaction to attack when an adjacent foe attacks another
Sharpshooter: Suffers no disadvantage on attacks at long range/Ranged attacks ignore 3/4 cover/Can make a -5 attack with a ranged weapon to inflict +10 damage
Shield Master: Can use a bonus action to shove the target 5' after an attack
Sneak Attack: Once per turn, inflicts +4d6 HP on an attack using a finesse or ranged weapon with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action and forego moving to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Tavern Brawler: Can use a bonus action to grapple after a successful unarmed or improvised attack
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage taken from a seen attacker by half
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Intelligence
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +5; Intelligence: +5; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes:
Resilient: Save Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: In dim or no light, has resistance to all damage other than psychic and radiant
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Mage Slayer: Has advantage on saves vs. spells cast by adjacent foes
Mounted Combatant: Mount suffers no damage on a successful Dexterity save and half on failure
Shield Master: +0 Dexterity vs. targeted spells and effects, and can use a reaction to suffer no damage instead of half on a successful Dexterity save
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; D0: 2; D: 1; W0: 2; W: 1 Attack: C: +4; D: +4; W: +5 Spell DC: C: 12; D: 12; W: 13
Magic Notes:
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Elemental Adept (Acid): Spells that inflict acid damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Cold): Spells that inflict cold damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Fire): Spells that inflict fire damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Lightning): Spells that inflict lightning damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Ritual Caster: Can cast spells of up to level 4 from a ritual book
Spell Sniper: Can cast attack spells at double normal range/Spells ignore 3/4 cover/Knows an additional attack cantrip
War Caster: Has advantage on concentration saves to maintain a spell/Can cast when holding a shield or a weapon/Can use a reaction to cast as an opportunity attack in response to movement
Notes
Validation Warnings:
Crossbow Expert Feat: Implies hand crossbow weapon, heavy crossbow weapon or light crossbow weapon
Shield Master Feat: Implies shield (currently None) != 'None'
Validation Errors:
Ability Boost Allocation: 19 available vs. 12 allocated

Blind Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature

Boon Of Speed Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19
Boon Of Spell Recall Feat: Requires level (currently 8) >= 19 and spellcasting feature

Dueling Feat: Requires fighting style feature

Interception Feat: Requires fighting style feature
